unit_of_work: GitHub repository listing feature (apps/jamstack) — branch feat/github-repos-listing
rationale: All four independent lenses return pass with no error- or warning-severity findings; no criterion fails. Endpoint, 10-per-page pagination, accessibility (axe zero violations both via @axe-core/playwright and @axe-core/cli), error handling, DRY logic, Tailwind Plus sourcing, docs, and clean git history all meet the bar. Proceed to verify.

findings.message: Security: React escapes rendered GitHub data (names/descriptions); href is sanitised; no target=_blank, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML, no leaked secrets.
Performance: server fetch cached with next:{revalidate:60} to stay under GitHub's 60/hr unauthenticated limit; no client-side fetching.
Accessibility: single h1, labelled section + nav, ul role=list, real-link pagination with non-focusable disabled spans; axe reports zero violations in e2e.
Light mode only: no dark: classes; globals.css pins color-scheme: light.
Architecture (server fetch + URL pagination, data layer, Tailwind Plus sourcing, rate limit) documented and matches code.
Setup is complete: install, dev (3000) vs prod (3100), and a11y scan prerequisites all documented; lockfile committed; chromedriver via onlyBuiltDependencies.
Git history is clean, one concern per commit, following the plan decomposition.
